channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: What is wrong with Congress?
item.description: Congress has many powers under Article I of the Constitution, but lawmakers have given much of that authority to the president.

item.title: Countdown begins for 2026 FIFA World Cup Final
item.description: MetLife Stadium in New Jersey will host Spain and Argentina for the 2026 World Cup Final, their first meeting.

item.title: 5.5 magnitude earthquake hits Peru's Andes region, killing at least 5
item.description: Local media broadcast images showing the distress of victims' relatives.

item.title: Nine people injured in Arizona shooting; suspect shot by police
item.description: Police said nine people were shot and injured in Tucson, Arizona, early Sunday. The suspected gunman was also shot and wounded by officers.
